title: Eva Drugs
wikitext:
[]: Eva/Drugs Post by captainhaddock » Fri Jun 15, 2007 10:21 pm I didn't see anything about this in the rules so I assume it's ok to talk about, sorry if not. Ever tried watching EoE on any kind of drug? I tried this last night (don't remember how I got the idea lol....)and WOW, it really did enhance the movie. Esp. the parts when thousands of images are flashing by every second. Sometimes I would kind of zone out and forget what was going on, but since I'd seen the movie like 3 times anyway it was easy to get back on track. Just seemed to give everything a deeper meaning. Just weed, I guess other stuff could be interesting but im not really into hard drugs

[]: Post by Hailtheplatypus » Fri Jun 15, 2007 10:25 pm Interesting... I always considered EoE to be a hallucination inducing object on its own... I can begin to mention how many auditory hallucinations I heard while watching those scenes in 5.1... just so much sound in one small place that your brain can only take so much...

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Jun 15, 2007 10:40 pm No, it's not in the rules, but I don't want anyone here to be encouraged to try combining Evangelion and hallucinagens. Not a very good direction to take forum discussion in.

Ever tried watching EoE on any kind of drug? I tried this last night (don't remember how I got the idea lol....)and WOW, it really did enhance the movie. Esp. the parts when thousands of images are flashing by every second. Sometimes I would kind of zone out and forget what was going on, but since I'd seen the movie like 3 times anyway it was easy to get back on track. Just seemed to give everything a deeper meaning. Just weed, I guess other stuff could be interesting but im not really into hard drugs
